title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: December 8, 2022
summary: December 8, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase but at a higher rate from last week, of 6.36% , from the level on 12/01/2022 of 10.739 M km 2 to 11.469 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resources...
